description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
What's Changed
- i18n: update translations by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1297
- chore: parse webkit version on linux by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1299
- revert: some browsers may report wrong pixel density, closes #1305 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1306
- config: add an option to sort TOC by page number, closes #1304 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1308
- css: add margin for div only when overriding layout, closes #1286 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1309
- fix: defers rendering all component until after hydration for Tauri platforms, closes #1301 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1311
- feat: show current books count in search bar, closes #1310 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1312
- fix: update current bookshelf items when library is updated by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1314
- feat: support note taking with markdown, closes #1097 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1315
- layout: render book description as html in book details, closes #1316 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1317
- feat: add search functionality to the notebook by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1318
- layout: notebook layout tweaks by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1319
- font: load CJK fonts only in CJK env or the book has CJK languages, closes #1298 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1323
- sync: add sync status menu item in view menu, closes #844 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1324
- chore: bump pdf.js to latest release of version 4 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1325
- feat: add an option to show estimated remaining time of the current chapter, closes #406 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1326
- release: version 0.9.52 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1327
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.51...v0.9.52
